timing_policy.method: Generate one natural Brazilian Portuguese utterance per segment, place it at the segment start, and preserve silence between segments.
fit_order: Tighten the Brazilian Portuguese wording without changing meaning.
Regenerate with pronunciation or punctuation adjustments.
Apply no more than 10 percent time compression when editorial changes cannot solve the overrun.
do_not: Synthesize each original VTT cue as a separate utterance.
Move narration across a visual transition without reviewing the picture.
Map the original English audio stream into the localized video.

language_policy.dialect: Natural Brazilian Portuguese for a professional technical audience.
language_policy.acronyms: Use IA in spoken Portuguese; retain OCP and product acronyms where technically appropriate.
language_policy.numbers: Preserve every source year, percentage, voltage, and monetary value exactly.
language_policy.tone: Warm, authoritative, concise, and natural for spoken Brazilian Portuguese.

audio_mix.method: The source audio stream will not be mapped. The aligned Brazilian Portuguese voice-only master will be mixed over viacheslavstarostin-educational-learning-study-music-473828.mp3, normalized to -27 LUFS. Music fades in, sidechain-ducks beneath narration, restores between phrases, and fades over the final four seconds.
audio_mix.review_warning: Confirm narration level, pronunciation, music balance, ducking transitions, and the final fade.

editorial_notes: Corrected clear AI-caption recognition errors before Brazilian Portuguese translation.
Preserved official OCP product, program, and organization names in English where required.

segments.english: To understand why OCP matters today, you have to go back to the critical point that started it all.
segments.portuguese: Para entender a importância do OCP hoje, volte ao ponto crítico onde tudo começou.

segments.english: In 2010, the rise of mobile computing, social media, and cloud storage caused internet traffic to explode.
segments.portuguese: Em 2010, computação móvel, redes sociais e armazenamento em nuvem fizeram o tráfego da internet explodir.

segments.english: But the hardware powering it was stuck in the past.
segments.portuguese: Mas o hardware continuava no passado.

segments.english: In 2011, Meta, formerly Facebook, hit a wall.
segments.portuguese: Em 2011, a Meta, então Facebook, chegou ao limite.

segments.english: They were growing so fast that traditional data center technology literally could not keep up.
segments.portuguese: O crescimento era rápido demais para a tecnologia tradicional de data centers.

segments.english: They weren't just running out of space; they were burning power on things that didn't matter.
segments.portuguese: Não faltava apenas espaço; também havia desperdício de energia em elementos que não importavam.

segments.english: At the time, every server was a black box: proprietary designs, gratuitous plastic bezels, logos that blocked airflow, and power supplies that were horribly inefficient.
segments.portuguese: Na época, cada servidor era uma caixa-preta: projetos proprietários, molduras plásticas supérfluas, logotipos que bloqueavam o fluxo de ar e fontes de alimentação extremamente ineficientes.

segments.english: If they wanted the scale, rules had to be broken.
segments.portuguese: Para ganhar escala, era preciso romper as regras.

segments.english: So, a small team of engineers at Facebook asked a radical question.
segments.portuguese: Então, uma pequena equipe de engenheiros do Facebook fez uma pergunta radical.

segments.english: What if we designed a data center like a single giant computer?
segments.portuguese: E se projetássemos um data center como um único computador gigante?

segments.english: What if we stripped away the vanity and focused only on efficiency?
segments.portuguese: E se nos despojássemos da vaidade e nos concentrássemos apenas na eficiência?

segments.english: That question launched the Open Compute Project, or OCP.
segments.portuguese: Essa pergunta lançou o Open Compute Project, ou OCP.

segments.english: OCP took the schematics for the most efficient server in the world, and we didn't patent them; we published them.
segments.portuguese: O OCP pegou os esquemas do servidor mais eficiente do mundo e, em vez de patenteá-los, publicou-os.

segments.english: We invited the world to hack our hardware.
segments.portuguese: Convidamos o mundo a modificar livremente nosso hardware.

segments.english: The result was the vanity-free server.
segments.portuguese: O resultado foi o servidor sem vaidade.

segments.english: We removed the plastic, centralized the power, and optimized the airflow.
segments.portuguese: Removemos plástico, centralizamos energia e otimizamos o fluxo de ar.

segments.english: It wasn't just cheaper to build; it was 38 percent more efficient and 24 percent less expensive to run.
segments.portuguese: Não era apenas mais barato construir; era 38% mais eficiente e 24% mais barato de operar.

segments.english: This model works so well for a reason.
segments.portuguese: Este modelo funciona tão bem por um motivo.

segments.english: Hyperscalers run into the physical limits of IT infrastructure years before anyone else because of their size, scale of operations, and relentless performance demands.
segments.portuguese: Os hiperscaladores atingem os limites físicos da infraestrutura de TI anos antes de qualquer outra pessoa devido ao seu tamanho, escala de operações e demandas implacáveis ​​de desempenho.

segments.english: Also, by solving these extreme scaling challenges with the industry and an open mindset first, and then publishing those blueprints, we hand those engineered solutions directly to the rest of the market, accelerating adoption and driving new industry benchmarks.
segments.portuguese: Além disso, ao resolver esses desafios extremos de escalabilidade primeiro com a indústria e uma mentalidade aberta, e depois publicar esses projetos, entregamos essas soluções de engenharia diretamente ao resto do mercado, acelerando a adoção e impulsionando novos benchmarks da indústria.

segments.english: OCP is not a standards body itself, but by the nature of its open innovation engine, it supports and contributes to standardization.
segments.portuguese: OCP não é um órgão de padronização em si, mas pela natureza de seu mecanismo de inovação aberta, apoia e contribui para a padronização.

segments.english: Today, OCP isn't just for hyperscalers; it's a 132-billion-dollar ecosystem.
segments.portuguese: Hoje, OCP não é apenas para hiperscaladores; é um ecossistema de 132 bilhões de dólares.

segments.english: From the colocation facility down the street to the edge of the telecom network, open hardware is the standard for high-performance computing.
segments.portuguese: Da instalação de colocation na rua até a borda da rede de telecomunicações, o hardware aberto é o padrão para computação de alto desempenho.

segments.english: But this isn't just history.
segments.portuguese: Mas isto não é apenas história.

segments.english: With the rise of AI and heat-dense workloads, the principles we established in 2011—
segments.portuguese: Com a IA e cargas térmicas mais densas, os princípios definidos em 2011—

segments.english: Efficiency, openness, impact, scale, and sustainability are the only way we will survive the next decade.
segments.portuguese: Eficiência, abertura, impacto, escala e sustentabilidade são a única forma de sobrevivermos na próxima década.

segments.english: So, welcome to the community. Let's take a look at the specs.
segments.portuguese: Então, seja bem-vindo à comunidade. Vamos dar uma olhada nas especificações.
